docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585) (TRANSACTION ID # 100073833) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK
